name: Tata Neu Infinity SBI Card

rewards.displayCategory: Select categories on Tata Neu App/Website
rewards.displayRate: Up to 10% Value Back as NeuCoins

rewards.displayCategory: Partner Tata brands and other Tata Neu spends

domestic: 8 domestic lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter, apply only if spends in the previous quarter are at least Rs 75,000.
international: 4 international lounge visits per year, capped at 1 per quarter, are available through complimentary Priority Pass membership.
Post the complimentary visits, lounge usage is charged at the programme's prevailing rate.

exclusions: wallet loads, gift or prepaid card loads, and voucher purchases
transactions excluded under Tata Neu Infinity SBI Card terms

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 1,499 NeuCoins as welcome benefit within 15 days of joining fee realisation

joiningBenefits: 1,499 NeuCoins as welcome benefit within 15 days of joining fee realisation
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 500 per statement cycle

redemption.ecosystemLabel: Tata Neu App/Website and partner Tata brands

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

additionalDetails: 1 NeuCoin equals Re 1 savings on Tata Neu App/Website and partner Tata brands
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card product page, Tata Neu Infinity T&C booklet, and Priority Pass FAQ on 2026-06-08.

The product page currently positions the accelerated extra 5% NeuCoins specifically around select Tata Neu app or website categories, so the rewards table keeps a separate display row instead of treating all Tata ecosystem spends as a flat 10% bucket.
Priority Pass membership on the product page is described as complimentary, with post-complimentary lounge visits charged at the programme's prevailing rate.
The current official materials describe welcome NeuCoins posting within 15 days of joining fee realisation.
The card is audited from official SBI sources but is not yet marked as manually verified by user.
